allow: Bash(node -e "const lucide = require\('lucide-react'\); const icons = Object.keys\(lucide\).filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('instagram'\)\); console.log\(icons.length ? icons : 'No Instagram icon found'\); const social = Object.keys\(lucide\).filter\(k => /social|twitter|facebook|github|link|globe/i.test\(k\)\).slice\(0, 10\); console.log\('Similar:', social\);")
